parsed_output.justification: Mitchell explicitly claimed to be a Werewolf, stating he was '100% sure' of it, although he later attempted to discourage others from voting for him. James also claimed to be a Werewolf, but his behavior was highly erratic—claiming to be the Witch and Troublemaker before finally voting for himself—which is characteristic of the Tanner. Given James's likely role as the Tanner, Mitchell is the most probable Werewolf.
